text: Hello. Hi, good morning. This is Evelyn. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Mississippi State Relief Program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? No. Oh, that's all right. That's exactly why I'm calling. I want to help you get these benefits processed before they go unclaimed. You're covered under both Part A and Part B, yes? Yeah. Perfect. You qualify for the benefits. I am forwarding you to our supervisor. Please hold on. Hi, thank you very much for holding on. My name is Antonio. How are you doing today? I'm doing good and don't call this fucking number no more. [BLANK_AUDIO]
